questions.question:
When configuring a WLAN with WPA2 PSK in the Cisco Wireless LAN Controller GUI, which two formats are 
available to select? (Chooese two).
R1 has learned route 10.10.10.0/24 via numerous routing protocols. WHich route is installed?

choices: route with the shortest prefix length
route with the lowest administrative distance
route with the next hop that has the highest IP

questions.question: which two spanning-tree states are bypassed on an interface running PortFast? (Choose two).

Which cable type must be used when connecting a router and switch together usmg thses:
1. Pins 1 and 2 are receivers and pins 3 and 6 are transmitters
2. Auto detection MDI-X is unavilable.

Refer to the exhibit. An engineer must configure the interface that connects to PC1 and secure it in a way that 
only PC1 is allowed to use the port. No VLAN tagging can be used except for a voice VLAN. Which command 
sequence must be entered to configure the switch?

choices:
SW1(config-if)# switchport mode nonegotitate 
SW1(config-if)# switchport port-security
SW1(config-if)# switchport port-security maximum 1

SW1(config-if)# switchport mode dynamic auto 
SW1(config-if)# switchport port-security
SW1(config-if)# switchport port-security violation restrict

SW1(config-if)# switchport mode access 
SW1(config-if)# switchport port-security
SW1(config-if)# switchport port-security mac-address 0050.7966.6800

SW1(config-if)# switchport mode dynamic desirable
SW1(config-if)# switchport port-security mac-address 005.7966.6800 
SW1(config-if)# switchport port-security mac-address sticky

questions.question: Which command enables HTTP access to the Cisco WLC?

Cisco engineer is configuring a factory-default router with these three passwords:
1. The user EXEC password for console access is p4ssw0rd1.
2. The user EXEC password for Telnet access is s3cr3t2.
3. The password for privileged EXEC mode is pri4t3p4ss.
Which command sequence must the engineer configure?

choices:
enable secret priv4t3p4ss
!
line con0
password p4ssword1 
login
!
line vty 0 15 
password s3cr3t2 
login

enable secret privilege 15 priv4t3p4ss
!
line con0
password p4ssword1 
login
!
login vty 0 15 
password s3cr3t2 
login

enable secret priv4tp4ss
!
line con0
password p4ssword1
!
line vty0 15 
password s3cr3t2

enable secret priv4t3p4ss
!
line con 0
password login p4ssw0rd1
!

questions.question: Why choose Cisco DNA Center for automated lifecycle management?

choices: to provide software redundancy in the network
to allow SSH access to all nodes in the network
to provide fast and accurate deployment of patches and updates
to perform upgrades without service interruption

questions.question:
Refer to the exhibit. All routers in the network are configured correctly, and the expected routes are being 
exchanged among the routers. Which set of routes are learned from neighbors and installed on router 2?

Refer to the exhibit. The switches are connected via a Cat5 Ethernet cable that was successfully tested. The 
interfaces are configured as access ports and are both in a "down" status. What is the cause of this issue?

choices: The portfast command is missimg from the configuration.
The switches are configured with incompatible duplex settings
The distance between the two switches is not supported by Cat5
The speed settings on the switches aare mismatched

questions.question: What is the difference between controller-based networks and traditional networks as they relate to control-plane and/or data-plane functions?

choices:
Controller-based networks centralize all important data-plane functions, and traditional networks distribute 
data-plane functions.

Controller-based networks centralize all important control-plane functions, and traditional networks distribute 
control-plane functions.

Traditional networks centralize all important control-plane functions, and controller-based networks 
distribute control-plane functions.

Traditional networks centralize all important data-plane functions, and controller-based networks distribute 
data-plane functions.

questions.question:

applications indicate the connectivity in unstable to the internet. What is causing the interface issue?

choices: Frames are discarded due to half-duplex negotiation.
Small frames less than 64 bytes are rejected due to size
The receive buffer is full due to a broadcast storm
Broadcast packets are rejected because ARP timeout is enabled

questions.question:
A switch is forwarding a frame out of all interfaces except the interface that received the fram. What is the 
technical term for this process?

What must a network administrator consider when deciding whether to configure a new wireless network with 
APs in autonomous mode or APs running in cloud-based mode?

choices: Autonomous mode APs are easy to deploy and automate than APs in cloud-based mode.
Autonomous mode APs are less dependent on an underlay but more complay to mintain than APs in cloud-based mode.
Cloud-based mode APs are easy to deploy but harder to automate than APs in autonomous mode

Cloud-based mode APs rely on underlays and are more complex to maintain than APs in autonomous 
mode

questions.question:

network thaa allows the branch to communicate with the head office. The central time server with IP address

the software clock of the new router synchrnizes with the timeserver?

to interface fastethernet 0/1?

connection must be maintained as users travel between floors or to other areas in the building, what must be 
the configuration of the connection?

choices: Enable Fast Transition and select the FT PSK option
Select the WPA Policy option with the CCKM option

questions.question:
Refer to the exhibit. For security reasons, automatic neighbor discovery must be disabled on the R5 Gi0/1 
interface. These tasks must be completed:
Disable all neighbor discovery methods on R5 interface Gi0/1. 
Permit neighbor discovery on R5 interface Gi0/2.
Verify there are no dunamically learned neighbors on R5 interface Gi0/1 
Display the IP address of R6's interface Gi0/2
Which configuration must be used?

choices:
R5(config)# int Gi0/1 
R5(config-if)# no cdp enable 
R5(config-if)# exit 
R5(config)# no lldp run 
R5(config)# cdp run
R5# sh cdp neighbor 
R5# sh lldp neighbor

R5(config)# int Gi0/1 
R5(config-if)# no cdp run 
R5(config-if)# exit 
R5(config)# llpd run 
R5(config)# cdp enable 
R5# sh cdp neighbor 
R5# sh lldp neighbor

R5(config)# int Gi0/1 
R5(config-if)# no cdp enable 
R5(config-if)# exit 
R5(config)# no llpd run 
R5(config)# cdp run
R5# sh cdp neighbor detail 
R5# sh lldp neighbor

R5(config)# int Gi0/1 
R5(config-if)# no cdp enable 
R5(config-if)# exit 
R5(config)# llpd run 
R5(config)# no cdp run
R5# sh cdp neighbor detail 
R5# sh lldp neighbor

questions.question:
An engineer must configure R1 for a new user account. The account must meet these requirements:
1. It must be configured in the local database.

3. It must use the strongest password configurable.

choices: R1(config)# username engineer2 privilege 1 password 7 test2021

R1(config)# username engineer2 algorithm-type scrypt secret test2021

device with Ansible installed that manages target devices
collection of actions to perform on traget devices, expressed in YAML format

questions.question:

questions.question: Refer to the exhibit. How will the device handle a packet destined to IP address 100.100.100.100?

choices:
It will choose the route with the lowest metric,
R 100.0.0.0/8 [120/2] via 192.168.3.1, 00:00:13, Ethernet0/3.

It will choose the route with the highest metric,
D 100.100.100.0/24 [90/435200] via 192.168.2.1.00:00:13. Ethernet0/2

It will choose the route with the longest match,
O 100.100.100.100/32 [110/21] via 192.168.1.1,00:05:57, Ethernet0/1

It will always prefer the static route over dynamic routes and choose the route
S 100.100.0.0/16 [1/0] via 192.168.4.1.

It is a public key cryptosystem
It uses preshared keys for encryption

choices: Manage flow control between an SDN controller and a switching fabric

questions.question:
An administrator must secure the WLC from receiving spoofed association requests. Which steps must be 
taken to configure the WLC to restrict the requests and force the user to wait 10 ms to retry an association 
request?

choices: Enable Security Association Teardown Protection and set the SA Query timeout to 10
Enable MAC filtering and set the SA Query timeout to 10
Enable the Protected Management Frame service and set the Comeback timer to 10
Enable 802.1x Layer 2 security and set the Comeback timer to 10

questions.question: Which two statements disringuish authentication from accounting? (Choose two).

choices: Only authentication challenges users for their credentials and returns a response
Only authentication records the duration of a user's connection
Only authentication provides supporting information for billing users

questions.question: What is a functionality of the control plane in the network?

It exchanges topology information with other routers

questions.question: When is the PUT method used within HTTP?

choices: when a noidempotent operation is needed
when a read-only operation is required

questions.question:
A router has two static routes to the same destination network under the same OSPF process. How does the 
router forward packets to the destination to the next-hop devices are different?

choices: The router chooses the next hop with the lowest IP address
The router chooses the route with the oldest age
The router load-balances traffic over all routes to the destination
The router chooses the next hop with the lowest MAC address

choices: Reduce the size of the forwarding table on network routers

It is the card on a core router that maintains all routing decisions for a campus

It serves as the centralized management point of an SDN architecture

questions.question:
Refer to the exhibit. An engineer is using the Cisco WLC GUI to configure a WLAN for WPA2 encryption with 
AES and preshared key Cisco0123456. After the engineer selects the WPA WPA2 option from the Layer 2 
Security drop-down list, which two tasks must they perform to complete the process? (Choose two).

choices: Select the WPA2 Policy and AES check boxes
Select the WPA2 Policy, AES, and TKIP check boxes
Select CCKM from the Auth Key Mgmt drop-down list, set the PSK Format to Hex, and enter the key

Select PSK from the Auth Key Mgmt drop-down list, set the PSK Format to ASCII, and enter the key

infrastructure

on internal hosts that stream data solely to external resources
on the public-facing interface of a firewall

questions.question: which statement best describes the IPsec site-to-site VPN?

choices: The VPN provides remote access and connects individual users to the headquarter network

The VPN gateway performs Network Address Translation and then transmits outbound traffic destined for 
the internet through a VPN tunnel

The VPN gateway encapsulates and encrypts outbound traffic and transmits it through a VPN tunnel over 
the internet to other end devices
The VPN provides access to roaming users and establishes connection with corporate IT resources.

questions.question:
Refer to the exhibit. An engineer is configuring an EtherChannel using LACP between Switches 1 and 2. Which 
configuration must be applied so that only Switch 1 sends LACP initiation packets?

choices:
Switch1(config-if)#channel-group 1 mode on 
Switch2(config-if)#channel-group 1 mode active

Switch1(config-if)#channel-group 1 mode passive 
Switch2(config-if)#channel-group 1 mode active

Switch1(config-if)#channel-group 1 mode active 
Switch2(config-if)#channel-group 1 mode passive

Switch1(config-if)#channel-group 1 mode on 
Switch2(config-if)#channel-group 1 mode passive

questions.question:
Refer to the exhibit. An engineer is updating the management access configuration of switch SQ1 to allow secured, 
encrypted remote configuration. Which two commands or command sequences must the engineer apply to the 
switch? (Choose two.)

choices:
E. SW1(config)# interface f0/1
SW1(confif-if)# switchport mode trunk

questions.question:
Refer to the exhibit. An engineer was asked to update a wireless LAN controller configuration on a newly deployed 
SSID “Office”. However, the configuration was not well documented or commented. What can the engineer 
determine about this configuration?

choices:
there is an additional protection level that helps secure the data frames exchanged between wireless clients 
and the access points for all wireless devicess

ther is a seamless transition mechanism used to expedite roaming form compatible devices by 
authentication them before potential roaming occurs

there is an extended delay that helps in minimizing the time it takes for client devices to stay connected after 
roaming activity for apple and andriod devices

there is an advanced secure algorithm put into the service to add an extra level of quality assurance for 
wireless delivery networks
